mutation: composite: prize-collecting selective pickup-delivery single-vehicle tour on an X-Y traverse gantry (Chebyshev/L-infinity metric) with rack-capacity batching and a per-served instrumentation cost -- choose which precedence-constrained mount/read pairs to perform and order them to minimize gantry travel plus instrumentation plus omission penalties
title: Wind-Tunnel Sensor Traverse: Selective Probe Mount-and-Read Tour
strategies: perform-nothing baseline: output an empty tour, cost = total omission penalty (calibration point)
standalone-benefit greedy: perform tasks whose omission penalty exceeds their solo dock round-trip travel plus instrumentation, each mounted then immediately read

profitable-set selection + capacity/precedence nearest-neighbor interleaving: pick profitable tasks then route with a nearest available (mount-or-read) event heuristic that batches probes on the rack to cut Chebyshev travel
penalty-driven subset reoptimization: alternate re-selecting the performed set and re-routing (local search) to trade gantry travel plus instrumentation against skipped-task penalties
